title: Birth of a New Hero
overview: Shortly after the Scientific Defense Guard had been assembled, ice burgs from the Antarctic region began to melt with one of them containing ancient monsters known as the Seagras

title: The Secret of the Shining Pendant
overview: The first and only appearance of Spiral the Tornado Monster

title: When the Weed Whistle Blows in the Evening
overview: One day in Japan a city was suddenly attacked by a monster from the Tōgō Mountain called a Wanigodon that appeared seemingly from nowhere.

title: Chase of the Mysterious Red Cloud
overview: Red Smogy the Cloud Monster Attacks!

title: The Passenger! Break through the Underground
overview: Several thousand trees disappear from the forest in a single night.  In an underground cave they find Toughgilas.

title: Challenge to the Burning Deep Sea
overview: A people evacuate from a tsunami, a mysterious flying object appears and rains down fire.

title: Order to Attack! The Objective Is Pig!
overview: A robot named Pig, picks up a danger signal of unclear origins.  When Hikari and Mutsumi chase after him, they find Electronic Monster Combugon.

title: Officer Hikari's Secret Has Been Stolen!?
overview: Hikari encounters monster Mikonos while investigating and unidentified flying object, but it turns out to be a trap set by Space Ninja Alien Baltan.

title: Terror of the Awakened Ancient Creature
overview: Investigators visit ancient ruins on Tamara Island, and spot Monster Dolfiego in an underground cavern.

title: I Saw It! The Illusion of a Monster...
overview: A famous magician, George Satake, tries to teleport himself from the Xalome Desert to Japan.

title: The Science Garrison's Challenge!
overview: Ogawara uses the giant Bulldozer Weapon Hectole he developed to dig into the earth in the Himalayas, and exterminate monsters.

title: The Curious Conversation Between a Monster and Pig
overview: Two tankers are caught in a storm and disappear.  The Science Guard Party takes the case, and discover three monsters attacking the tankers.

title: The Sad Legend of the Revived Lake
overview: At Lake Ryujin in Tohoku, an incident breaks out where people and fish are being turned into stone.

title: The Star's Devil Has Come!
overview: An unidentified celestial body approaches Earth, and emits radiation that makes reptiles violent.

title: You Are Ultraman
overview: Monster Goglan comes out of an egg that was brought into the plant research institute.  Hikari chooses to fight it with his own abilities.

title: The Living Phantom Bird
overview: The Science Guard Party gets a report that an island has sunk.

title: Beetamii Has Disappeared!
overview: Tobe, who had been observing a strange typhoon using Beatamy, discovers Prof. Nishiki's helicopter which has crashed in the desert.

title: The Mysterious Monster Island
overview: A sea serpent emerges at a South Uki Island, the hometown of Yuriko.

title: This is the Ultra Star! Part 1
overview: Joneus struggles with monsters popping up in countries around the world.

title: This is the Ultra Star! Part 2
overview: Hikari is brought to Ultra Planet U40 where he is resuscitated back to life.  Hikari meets Joneus' sister Amia as well as Elek, Loto and other Ultra people.

title: This is the Ultra Star! Part 3
overview: The Badel Tribe manipulates the legendary Monster Bagon from the Dark Nebula and attacks U40.

title: The South Sea's Suspicious Space
overview: The Science Guard Party are spending their vacation in Marume's hometown.  There are frequent occurrences of ships sinking.

title: The Supersonic Confrontation
overview: Mysterious flying objects are attacking passenger planes and industrial complexes.

title: Two Officer Mutsumi's
overview: The Princess of Alpha Centuri's first planet copies Mutsumi and infiltrates the Science Guard Party.

title: The Devil's Garden
overview: Incidents begin to happen where men go missing whenever a yellow wind blows through the African desert.

title: Earth's Greatest Crisis!
overview: A strange phenomenon of water spraying of the sea is happening around the world as a message from Earth itself to humanity, asking it to leave.

title: The Flying Monster Island!
overview: The Ultra Planet U40 detects the approach of the Space Demon alien Baladon.  The Great Sage dispatches Elek, Loto, and five Ultra Warriors.

title: The New Cap Has Arrived!
overview: The Science Guard Party captures a monster in a coastal industrial area just as the newly assigned Captain Gondow arrives in front of them.

title: The Devil's UFO's Large Invasion
overview: Invading Alien Jadan sends out of countless UFOs.  The Space Self-Defense Unit goes out to fight them off, but the alien succeeds in invading Earth.

title: The Enormous Fossil has Come To Life
overview: The bones of the giant creature are excavated from ruins in Okutama, Tokyo.  However, the bones turn into Monster Skeledon, who destroys the museum.

title: The Female Ultra Warrior
overview: Joneus' sister Amia heads toward Earth to meet Hikari.  IN order to get close to Kikari, who has no memory of U40, she borrows the body of a woman.

title: Object X From Space
overview: Alien Babilar sends Robot Monster Megasaura, to Earth as part of his invasion plan.  Megasaura breaks apart when it enters Earth's atmosphere.

title: Go! Magma's Desperate Sphere
overview: Underwater volcanoes explode in the Pacific Ocean, followed by changes in the Earth's crust in various locations.

title: The Monster Accommodation Star Has Been Stolen (Prequel)
overview: The Space Pirate Imbedians pillage the Monster Containment Planet Prison created buy the Ultrapeople of U40, and attempt to invade the Earth.

title: The Monster Accommodation Star Has Been Stolen (Sequel)
overview: Joneus users up all his energy fighting the monster sent by the Imbedians, and Hikari also gets injured.

title: The Snow Woman Has Come From Space
overview: Hikari and Mutsumi go to the investigate the cause of an abnormal cold front in the Southern Alps.

title: Ultra Star U40's Crisis! Ultria's Mystery?
overview: U40 is occupied bu the Heller Army.  Amia escapes to Earth, but an army battleship flies to Earth as well.

title: Giant Ultra War! Huge Warship Ultria's Sortie
overview: Amia goes onboard the Ultria, which has emerged from beneath the ice at the South Pole.

title: Aim at Huge Warship Ultria
overview: Royger of the Heller Army sends the Terrible Space Creature Hellcat, which sucks energy from humans and mummifies them, to the Space Station EGG 3.

title: The Boy Who Took a Monster
overview: The boy from Planet Opernicus, Fedelcio, was taught by Royger that Earthlings are evil, and takes his pet Monster Orolaan to destroy cities on Earth.

title: Clash! Ultraman vs. Ultraman
overview: Rotating Monster Giros appears and the Science Guard Party is dispatched, but Hikari crashes due to a tornado caused by the monster.

title: Ultraman's Strategy to Living
overview: A moving island is Hatari's giant spacecraft, and he has come to Earth to capture Ultraman.

title: The Monkey That Became a Monster?!
overview: A mysterious unmanned spaceship recovered in outer space is determined to be a receiver for an electron transmitter developed bu the Heller Army.

title: Ultria Was Broken In Two?!
overview: Multiple rockets are shot at Earth from the Alien Sien spaceship, and a violent monster emerges.

title: Pig Was Holding a Bomb
overview: An airplane carrying Terrestrial Defense Force Unit 201 returns from the northern base, but there is something wrong with the captain and the 51 soldiers.

title: Revive Mutsumi
overview: Tobe and Marume create a device that emits a radio wave only Ultraman can perceive.  It seems as though this will cause Hikari's secret to be exposed.

title: To The Ultra Star! Part 1: The Female Warrior's Information
overview: Cities around the world suffer attacks from the Heller Army.  The final battle of Earth and U40 vs the Heller Army is finally upon us.

title: To The Ultra Star! Part 2: The Frontline Base's Destruction
overview: The Science Guard Party locates Titan, and begins its attack.

title: To The Ultra Star! Part 3: U (Ultra) Fleet's Large Fierce Battle
overview: The Science Guard Party joins the U40 Ultra Fleet and they infiltrate Heller City but are captured.

title: To The Ultra Star! Conclusion: Towards Peace and Victory
overview: The Great Sage had been reduced to atoms bu Heller, but in space, Joneus separated from Hikari can be seen fighting the Heller fleet.
